query:
SELECT bp.sha
            FROM "BomPart" bp
            JOIN "DocumentBom" db ON bp."documentBomId" = db.id
            WHERE db."documentId" = $1
            AND db.id = (
                SELECT db_inner.id
                FROM "DocumentBom" db_inner
                WHERE db_inner."documentId" = $1
                ORDER BY db_inner."updatedAt" DESC
                LIMIT 1
            )
